prestazioni: Upgrade the twin-turbocharged 6.3L V8 (engine code: SSC *V8T-6.3L*) with a custom billet aluminum crankshaft from Manley Performance (PN: 16300) and forged Mahle pistons (PN: 53935) to handle 1,300+ HP on E85 fuel, paired with Carrillo H-beam connecting rods (PN: HBEAM-6.125) for 10.5:1 compression ratio

Install a bespoke turbo system featuring twin Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbos (PN: 807198-5002S) with 76mm billet compressor wheels, custom 4.5" stainless steel downpipes by Burns Stainless, and a TiAL MV-R 60mm wastegate (PN: MVR60) for precise boost control at 32 psi

Replace the OEM fuel system with dual Bosch Motorsports 044 high-flow fuel pumps (PN: 0 580 254 953), ID1700x injectors from Injector Dynamics (PN: ID1700XDS), and a custom fuel rail setup by Radium Engineering with -8AN feed/return lines, controlled via a Motec M150 ECU with flex-fuel and traction control mapping
estetica: Install a full carbon fiber widebody conversion kit by Liberty Walk (LB-WORKS SSC Ultimate Aero kit, PN: LB-SSC-UA), including extended front fenders, rear quarter panels, and a custom rear diffuser with integrated titanium exhaust outlets by Fi EXHAUST

Replace the OEM wheels with custom HRE FF16 flow-formed wheels (20x12 front, 21x13 rear) in a matte bronze finish, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (345/25R21 front, 375/20R21 rear) for maximum grip, paired with AP Racing CP9460 calipers and 400mm carbon-ceramic rotors

Add a custom aero package featuring a front splitter with adjustable carbon fiber canards by APR Performance, a rear wing with active Gurney flap by Vorsteiner (PN: V-STEINER-SSC-UA), and a full underbody diffuser with integrated LED lighting by Diode Dynamics
